title: 我靠挂机撩女神
description:
Story:By 2050, human civilization has entered the "Early Interstellar Exploration Era," achieving significant technological breakthroughs: artificial intelligence has permeated daily life, the global population has stabilized at around 9 billion, and the urbanization rate has reached 85%. Humanity has begun launching probes to near-Earth planets in an attempt to search for traces of extraterrestrial life.

At this time, humanity has not yet formed a unified global defense system, creating a vulnerability for future alien invasions. Women occupy a vital position in society, participating extensively in technological research, government administration, and basic production, even dominating in some areas (such as biotechnology and interstellar exploration). This is a key reason why alien species target and steal energy points.

The protagonist is an awakened individual with fire abilities. He shoulders the important task of eliminating alien creatures and saving Earth's women. His intelligence, courage, and selfless sacrifice earn him favor and a large female fanbase. Some of these women awaken weak supernatural abilities (such as perception and healing) and actively join his resistance, becoming his support and foreshadowing later love-hate relationships.

Gameplay:• AFK Battle: Very relaxing, no manual operation required! You'll receive rewards every 3 minutes of AFK gameplay!

Character :

Li Muwan

Occupation: Full-time housewife

Bra size: D

Hobbies: Singing, dancing, running, cooking

Susan (Li Muwan's best friend)

Occupation: KTV owner

Bra size: D

Hobbies: Singing, dancing, yoga, racing

Music Challenge:Players can visit karaoke bars to participate in music game challenges; successful challenges earn energy rewards.

Special Features:Use energy to unlock special poses and actions with the heroines.
description_short: This is a super casual little game where you can earn rewards just by playing offline. You can also listen to several nice original songs. After a busy day, relax and enjoy a moment of peace.
